message:
chore(beads): rotate br_history issue tracker snapshots

Remove 100 expired snapshots from 2026-02-17 and add 100 new snapshots
from 2026-02-18 as part of the normal beads_rust issue tracker rotation
cycle. Each JSONL file captures a point-in-time snapshot of issue state
for audit trail and cross-agent coordination.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
